currency_code.description: The transaction currency following ISO standard format such as `MYR`.

description.description: Description of the transaction, usually appears on reports.

exchange_rate.description: The transaction exchange rate to convert from home currency to the specified currency. Leave as `1` if transaction is in home currency.

file_id.description: The file id of the file to be attached to the transaction.

internal_note.description: Internal note of the transaction, for owner's use

journal_items.description: The journal items of the transaction.

credit_amount.description:
Amount that was credited from the account. 
Leave `null` if `debit_amount` is populated.

debit_amount.description:
Amount that was debited from the account. 
Leave `null` if `credit_amount` is populated.

line.description: The sequence of the item within the array.

tax_code_id.description: The tax code of the item.

number.description:
The transaction number. 

Supports number format (eg. KT-[5DIGIT]) or actual number (eg. KT-00012), leave blank to use default number format.

To use any other Number Format other than the default one set under Control Panel → Number Formats, 
please ensure that Custom Number Format option is available on your plan, and the option is turned on in your Company Settings.

If you are not updating the number, keep the value as is of what you got from the Read APIs. 

When updating a transaction, this field no longer supports number format number creation (eg. KT-[5DIGIT]).
